comment.body: The thing is, suppose the admin has an agenda, to regulate immigration, to balance trade, to make allies contribute more to defense etc., which might not be all unfair or nonsensical. comment.body:
1. i already said in some chats that i was born under aries zodiac in the year of dragon... the rest you can find out from additional infos ;)) and you'll get your number, if this is what you are interested in the most

2. "it's okay to be gay lets rejoice with the boys in a gay waaaaay" :D https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_J10WRzLdO4
however, I was in love with the cat-girl from Freddie Mercury's "Living on my own" video (just came to my mind)

3. I shared a lot. it was mostly poker and its math that made me realize what strategies I should research to build a wealth. But the number one is Graham.
Because the goal is to build and preserve wealth, not to sit at a desk and trade for just fun... it is not fun, just waste of time in itself

4. in math field, i do researches on quantum logic. Logic is my main speciality. I don't work on quantum computation but i have friends who do. 
I honestly don't understand quite well the software developping field of that... but i know that they miss the algos to handle a quantum computer.
in hardware level it is theoretically done, but no software to drive it. 
Quantum logic based math is the hardest thing to do, requires a whole new system.
I'm working on that math/calculus system, not directly on q-tech

comment.body: Alma : Could you kindly answer how you arrive at the monthly max level from the vol selling. This might be a naieve question and in my current understanding VIX represents a30 day expectation of SPX volatility and is calculated from a weighted average of near time options across various strike prices. I have never seen a direct equation between SPX level and VIX.

comment.body:
forget VIX for these purposes...
i create a distribution for volatility, and derive the implied distribution for both vol and the index.
then i calculate what index levels would be produced by different vol moves based on the expectations.
i like to compare both my model and the one that the positioning implies

comment.body:
https://x.com/spotgamma/status/1963724012875350314
This may have been posted already. It has a short video with info on Thu Sep 4, and a bit on Wed Sep 3.
As well as IC's being more frequent, I've noticed that there are additional call and put spreads appearing.
The Spot Gamma thesis is that as well as Captain Condor and others doing IC's, there is a new participant doing "seek and destroy" to break one of the condor wings, typically the upper one.
